headline: Is It Time To Reassess Nucor (NUE) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Nucor's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, you are asking the right question before making any long term decisions. Nucor closed at US$195.87, with returns of 5.2% over the last 7 days, 21.5% over the last 30 days, 15.6% year to date, 79.9% over 1 year, 33.3% over 3 years, and 171.6% over 5 years. These figures may have shifted how the market is thinking about both its potential and its risks. Recent coverage around Nucor has focused on...
